title: Schoolnet India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Schoolnet India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Schoolnet India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!
